# Devon Context — Summary

Devon is the CEO of **Noontide Collective LLC**, operating as "Paperclip-native" (10s heartbeat) with Hermes Agent (Telegram-connected) as his execution runtime. He's currently building an AI agent team around three cores: the **Morning Brief** system (automated 6AM intelligence digest), **Main Branch** Skool community ($7,735 MRR), and a **Paperclip-based marketing flywheel**. His most recent Telegram sessions show him focused on agent team architecture (NOO-1/NOO-2 plans), YouTube research pipelines (Lenny podcast, Tristan Harris), and fixing Hermes reliability issues. He told his agent: *"I want you to do everything that it takes to be prepared for tonight's run and I want tonight's run to be based on the vision. I want to be using agents, actors, researching, and I want an excellent report tomorrow."* He's been integrating ReadWise MCP for Twitter bookmarks, debugging Paperclip cost tracking ($0 showing), and prefers clean "CIA memo / presidential briefing" style documents over tables in Telegram.

## Project Index
- **Morning Brief System** — Automated 6AM PT digest, cron-driven, YouTube + Twitter + blog monitoring
- **Main Branch (Skool)** — $7,735 MRR creative entrepreneur community; Benny AI operator being developed
- **Paperclip Platform** — Primary agent runtime; cost observability issues (OpenRouter not tracking)
- **Hermes Agent** — Telegram-connected execution runtime; voice note reliability recently fixed
- **Noontide Collective** — Core business entity; 30-day CEO plan in execution with Research Agent next
